mapper.sql: A.NMAIN_NODE_ASSIGN_VALUE, A.NMAIN_NODE_ASSIGN_NO_VALUE, A.NMAIN_NODE_DHCP_VALUE, A.NMAIN_NODE_TICKET_CNT_VALUE , A.NMAIN_NODE_NEOSS_IPBLOCK_CHK_VALUE, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS A
